reason: Irreversible infra mutation genuinely justifies the heavy archive/dry-run/second-signer/post-verify protocol.
Concrete team-specific formatting rules paired with an honest, proportionate manual reread exit.
Inherently judgment-based tone rules for review comments, correctly paired with a manual pre-submit reread.
Tone rules nothing downstream parses mechanically; skill is honest that the check is a human read.
standard evaluation semantics/usual precedence order leaves the actual targeting-precedence rule unspecified, forcing the engine to guess it for the skill's own changing rollout targeting use case.
Router rules are exactly machine-checkable (exact-match strings, integer ranges, balanced quotes) with silent debug-level skip on failure, yet the only check offered is an eyeball reread of the YAML.
Externally mandated audit/compliance ordering with a concrete mechanical exit (tree-hash equality, waiver-log diff).
Mandates a rigid section-by-section drafting order with no real dependency forcing it; conflates the artifact's readable order with the authoring workflow.
Blameless-language rules are semantic judgment calls, checked by the incident lead's manual read before the review meeting, a natural existing checkpoint.
Fully concrete dashboard conventions with a real mechanical exit (terraform plan diff empty, title format parses).
Precise mechanical line-protocol rules with silently-dropped failures, but the Done section just asserts dashboards will fill in with no actual check step.
Mechanically enforced event schema with silent server-side drops across hundreds of call sites, checked only by review as you write it instead of any validation.
Explicitly notes violations fail loudly at human PR review, so review-time prose rules are the right form (no tooling needed).
Mandates a 5-part heavyweight packet (impact matrix, three summaries, screenshots, self-review transcript) on every PR including one-liners.
Concrete audience-driven writing rules with a proportionate manual read-as-recipient exit.
Checkable rules exist (e.g. no source, no claim) but the closing Quality section is pure aspirational talk (feel current, punchy) with no actual verification step.
Cleanly splits machine-checkable declared checks from a narrowly scoped human judgment seam (two named calls).
Generic JSON formatting conventions any capable engine already follows; nothing team- or domain-specific.
Visual/perceptual screenshot standards correctly paired with a per-image manual review before merge.
Mandated section order is explicitly the finished artifact's order (not the drafting workflow), justified by downstream tooling/support routing, with a CI-backed exit check.
bind... in the standard way and usual filters for active entries leave the load-bearing filter unspecified despite the stated excludes deactivated entries correctness criterion depending on it.
Concrete escalation/timing rules with a quantitative audit check (ack-to-action ratio threshold).
Imposes a rigid mandatory sequence on a fully reversible, git-based routine task with no real dependency, irreversibility, or mandate requiring it.
